{{Quote|When we got back, I took it to the Jedi Master Tolan Hing. He told me that the fusing between the flux aperture and the power cell needed a slight adjustment.|Ferus Olin, to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on Darra Thel-Tanis's lightsaber|<ref name="TFS" />}}
'''Tolan Hing''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]<ref name="TFS" /> during the Republic's final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]]. Based in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], he was revered<ref name="CSWE" /> for being an expert in [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers']] inner workings<ref name="TFS" /> as well as the [[Weapon/Legends|weapons']] construction. He could repair almost any damage done to a lightsaber that had been used in a fight.<ref name="CSWE" />

In [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown]]'' to [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].</ref> after [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Darra Thel-Tanis]] [[Death/Legends|died]] in [[Mission to Korriban (23 BBY)|battle]] due to a faulty lightsaber, Jedi Padawan [[Ferus Olin]] brought the lightsaber to Hing, who found that the [[Flux aperture/Legends|flux aperture]] and [[power cell]]'s fusing needed a slight adjustment.<ref name="TFS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tolan Hing was first mentioned in [[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown|''The Final Showdown'']], the [[2004]] tenth entry in the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Quest]]'' novel series by [[Jude Watson]].<ref name="TFS" />

*''[[Jedi Quest: The Final Showdown]]'' {{1stm}}
